data_note: CSV retains additional absolute quantities such as residual OD and signal_to_destruction for provenance; the SVG intentionally plots only |phi|, N_gamma, and |phi|/N_gamma.

far_detuned_scalings.signal_per_scattered_photon: approximately proportional to Delta in the far-detuned limit

figure_layout: single-panel log-log plot with one shared detuning axis and one shared normalised-value axis
internal_title: removed; dissertation caption should carry the explanatory title
interpretation_note: In the far-detuned limit the phase-like signal scales approximately as 1/Delta, while scattering and residual OD scale approximately as 1/Delta^2.
label: v1_representative_uncalibrated

normalisation.rule: Each plotted curve is divided by its own maximum finite absolute value over the configured detuning range. Absolute values are saved in CSV.

quantity_definitions.scattered_photons_per_atom: N_gamma is scattered photons per atom.
quantity_definitions.scattering_time_relation: N_gamma = R_sc * tau at fixed exposure time.

status: Version 1 representative / uncalibrated detuning trade-off analysis
working_point_marker: A small marker is plotted on the |phi|/N_gamma curve at 1.5 GHz.
